About CCS

The Coalition for Construction Safety (CCS) is a nonprofit organization dedicated to achieving zero injuries on construction job sites and administers the CCS Certification Program. Companies that attain CCS certification represent companies with a safety performance among the top 20% of construction companies in the US. Information on the CCS Certification Program can be found at http://www.ccscertification.org/ or by calling CCS at 317-686-2665.
